# AffixEffect.HasParam property

True when this effect carries a real parameter in [`ParamPlus12`](./ParamPlus12.md) (a parametric or tag-conditional attribute). False when the slot is the [`NoParam`](./NoParam.md) sentinel.

public bool HasParam { get; }
